creator: h@hartzer.sh
text:
(In reply to Ashish SHUKLA from comment #2)

Hi!

Let me start with the backtrace. Let me know if this helps or not.

Thanks!

Process 58968 stopped
* thread #1, name = 'profanity', stop reason = signal SIGSEGV: invalid address (fault address: 0x0)

   98            * boundaries is integral multiple of word size.
   99            */
   100          lp = (const unsigned long *)((uintptr_t)str & ~LONGPTR_MASK);
-> 101          va = (*lp - mask01);
   102          vb = ((~*lp) & mask80);
   103          lp++;
   104          if (va & vb)
